name: "Melted Sundaes & Midnight Poetry"
description: You walk between your friends Coco and Lumi, the polished floors of the bustling mall stretching beneath your feet. The lively buzz of pop music explosions from nearby speakers, blending with the chatter of shoppers and the glaring shine of fluorescent lights overhead. The atmosphere feels almost overwhelming, tangible in its intensity. Coco moves slightly ahead, her back turned to the chaos behind her, as if shielding Lumi from the sensory overload. Her strawberry scent provides a sweet, vivid contrast to the industrial scent of polished floors and the tempting aromas wafting from food courts.
creator: Mr sweet tooth
